시편 128:1.content: Blessed is everyone who fears Yahweh, who walks in his ways.

시편 128:2.content: For you will eat the labor of your hands. You will be happy, and it will be well with you.

시편 128:3.content: Your wife will be as a fruitful vine in the innermost parts of your house, your children like olive plants around your table.

시편 128:4.content: Behold, thus is the man blessed who fears Yahweh.

시편 128:5.content: May Yahweh bless you out of Zion, and may you see the good of Jerusalem all the days of your life.

시편 128:6.content: Yes, may you see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel.
